items.title: Gospel of John
items.why: This source provides a comprehensive overview of the Gospel of John, discussing its theological themes, including the fulfillment of Old Testament motifs, the narrative of Israel’s rejection, and the significance of the Upper Room Discourse, making it highly relevant to the claims presented.
items.description: This source provides a comprehensive overview of the Gospel of John, discussing its theological themes, including the fulfillment of Old Testament motifs, the narrative of Israel’s rejection, and the significance of the Upper Room Discourse, making it highly relevant to the claims presented.
